2235830.name: MUA Demo
2235830.description:
MUA is an online FPS title in which players take control of characters and challenge other players online in six-versus-six objective based battles. Featuring fast-paced action and immersive controls, players can switch between many different characters to suit the ever changing battle conditions. Utilize their unique characteristics and cooperate with teammates to secure the win.


This demo features the ability to quickly compete online against other users.
Use various characters to win the battle!
2235830.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
